Node.help: Container that associates a list of traffic generating Activities with a PortGroup network configuration.

PropertyString.name: portGroupId
PropertyString.help: The portGroup name to use for this test model

PropertyString.name: activityModelId
PropertyString.help: The activityModel name to use for this test model

PropertyNodeList.help: The list of traffic generating activities associated with this ActivityModel. See ActivityInstance object for more info.
PropertyNodeList.name: activities
